# zone

**Instance Property**

The memory pool from which the buffer was created.

## Declaration

```swift
var zone: any MDLMeshBufferZone { get }
```

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator/newBuffer(from:data:type:)] or [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMeshBufferAllocator/newBuffer(from:length:type:)] method of an allocator to reserve memory in a shared pool for multiple related buffers.

## Inspecting a Buffer

- **allocator**: The allocator object that created the buffer.
- **type**: The type of data contained in a buffer.
